title: olearia allomii
intro: Olearia allomii, also known as the Allom's tree daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. It is native to the southwestern region of Western Australia. Olearia allomii has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, and has been used to treat various health issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are believed to offer health benefits such as relief from pain, reduced inflammation, and improved immune function.
